message:
fix: consistent UTF-8 boundary handling in truncate functions

Apply UTF-8-safe truncation across all remaining truncate functions:
- internal/alerts/generator.go truncateString()
- internal/cli/checkpoint.go truncateStr()
- internal/output/text.go Truncate()
- internal/pipeline/executor.go truncatePrompt()
- internal/pipeline/pipeline.go truncate()
- internal/robot/markdown.go truncateStr()

All functions now:
- Handle maxLen <= 0 by returning empty string
- Handle maxLen <= 3 by returning truncated "..."
- Find rune boundaries to avoid splitting multi-byte characters

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
